title: Private Dinners
summary: Intimate chef-led dining experiences designed for anniversaries, birthdays, client hosting, and unforgettable evenings at home.
benefits: Multi-course menus inspired by Pacific Northwest ingredients and elegant hospitality.
Relaxed, polished in-home service with thoughtful pacing and presentation.
A restaurant-level experience without leaving your home or vacation property.
idealFor: Couples, hosts, executives, and families seeking a refined private chef Port Angeles WA experience.
